title: Spiced Shakshuka
description: A North African-inspired dish where eggs are poached in a rich, flavorful tomato sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the richly spiced, ground cumin, ground coriander, cayenne pepper (if using), salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the shakshuka and stir to combine. Bring to a simmer.
Create 4 wells in the sauce and crack an egg into each well.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are cooked to desired doneness.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro (if desired).
